prompt:
Declaration (in builder format):

DistributedRalph
  .workers(Pool
      .agents(count: 6, model: "sonnet-4.6", role: "implementer")
      .agents(count: 1, model: "opus-4.7",  role: "reviewer")
      .max_concurrent_per_repo(2))                        // avoid file-lock thrash
  .backlog(GitBacked
      .source(repo: "github.com/lambda-run/ops", file: "fix_plan.md")
      .claim(strategy: "atomic_branch_lock", ttl: "10m")
      .release(on: ["merge", "abandon", "ttl_expiry"]))
  .protocol(Coordination
      .conflict(resolve: "last_write_wins_after_rebase")
      .escalate(when: "rebase_conflict_3x", to: reviewer_pool)
      .gossip(channel: "slack:#ralph-bus", events: ["claim", "merge", "block"]))
  .loop(Condition
      .continue_while: backlog.has_open_tasks
      .stop_if: [budget.exceeded($50), human.kill_switch, error_rate > 0.3])
  .recovery(OnCrash
      .release_claims(by: dead_worker_id)
      .requeue(task: orphaned, with: "retry_count++")
      .max_retries(3, then: park_for_human))
  .observe(Telemetry
      .log(events: ["claim", "commit", "fail"], to: "loki")
      .metric(success_rate, p50_task_seconds, claim_contention)
      .surface(to: human, when: error_rate > 0.2 || queue_stuck > "30m"))
  .terminate(When
      .backlog_empty
      .or budget_exhausted
      .or human_signals_done)

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• 6 implementer agents using model "sonnet-4.6"
• 1 reviewer agent using model "opus-4.7"
• Agent role "implementer" assigned to the 6-agent pool
• Agent role "reviewer" assigned to the 1-agent pool
• Maximum 2 concurrent agents per repository
• Backlog source repository: github.com/lambda-run/ops
• Backlog source file: fix_plan.md
• Backlog storage mechanism: git-backed
• Claim strategy: atomic branch lock
• Claim TTL: 10 minutes
• Claim released on merge event
• Claim released on abandon event
• Claim released on TTL expiry event
• Conflict resolution strategy: last_write_wins_after_rebase
• Escalation trigger: rebase conflict occurring 3 times on same task
• Escalation target: reviewer pool (the opus-4.7 agent)
• Gossip channel: Slack #ralph-bus
• Gossip events published: claim
• Gossip events published: merge
• Gossip events published: block
• Loop continues while backlog has open tasks
• Loop stops if budget exceeds $50
• Loop stops if human kill switch is activated
• Loop stops if error rate exceeds 0.30
• On crash: release all claims held by the dead worker ID
• On crash: requeue orphaned tasks
• Requeued tasks have retry_count incremented by 1
• Maximum retry count: 3
• Tasks exceeding 3 retries are parked for human review
• Log event: claim, destination: Loki
• Log event: commit, destination: Loki
• Log event: fail, destination: Loki
• Metric collected: success_rate
• Metric collected: p50_task_seconds
• Metric collected: claim_contention
• Human alert triggered when error rate exceeds 0.2
• Human alert triggered when queue is stuck longer than 30 minutes
• Termination condition: backlog is empty
• Termination condition: budget is exhausted
• Termination condition: human signals done
